data.name: Far Beach: Desire Remains
data.detailed_description:
“This is how your desire draws me — like in hentai fantasies.” 
Oolah's words when he first hallucinated.

Stranded on a breathtaking yet completely abandoned island, a man struggles to stay alive as his mind slowly unravels under the crushing weight of absolute solitude. What first appears to be a tropical paradise soon reveals itself as a place marked by silence, decay, and forgotten lives.

Experienced in first-person perspective, Far Beach places players inside the thoughts of a castaway who turns to the island’s strange mushrooms as a way to escape pain — and the unbearable loneliness. Through their effects, a mysterious and beautiful woman appears in vivid hallucinated video chats, becoming his only companion, emotional refuge, and the center of his growing desires.

What begins as comfort and pleasure slowly transforms into dependency.

As this imagined relationship overtakes his reality, the island itself seems to respond. Disturbing visions surface, shadows move where nothing should be, and fragments of the island’s past emerge — hinting at former inhabitants who vanished under unclear circumstances. Abandoned structures, personal belongings, and a long-forgotten lighthouse stand as silent witnesses to a tragedy that left the island completely deserted.

Far Beach is not only about surviving hunger and isolation — it is about uncovering a hidden mystery buried beneath the sand, and exploring how loneliness, desire, and the human mind can shape both paradise… and madness.

Far Beach is a first-person survival experience centered around exploration, resource management, and psychological progression. Players navigate a fully interactive island using a complete inventory system, allowing them to collect food, manage supplies, and use items to stay alive.

Hunger and fatigue are core mechanics. Food must be gathered and consumed to maintain energy, while rest and sleep are necessary to recover from exhaustion and continue exploring the environment.

Among the island’s resources are strange mushrooms that provide bursts of energy — but also trigger a unique video-based chat system. When consumed, a mysterious nude woman appears in a simulated conversation, interacting with the player through pre-recorded visual responses and dialogue, blending survival gameplay with narrative-driven hallucinations.

The game supports keyboard and mouse as well as gamepad controls. For the most precise interaction and immersive experience, keyboard and mouse are recommended.

data.short_description: Experienced in first person, Far Beach pulls players into the mind of a castaway who uses strange mushrooms to escape pain and loneliness. Through them, a seductive woman appears, becoming his only sexual partner, lover, and companion. What begins as comfort soon turns into addiction.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (AMD FX 8350) or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (AMD Radeon R9 290) or greater
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (AMD FX 8350) or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1070 (AMD Radeon RX 480) or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
